reason: Phase 1 implementation and validation are centered on node extent read/write behavior.
Phase 2 and Phase 4 need the cache identity and pin lifecycle constraints from this spec.
Phase 3-5 require the volume ownership, writeback worker, and shutdown contracts.
The unique Journal ownership and pin interaction need to stay aligned with journal behavior.
Failure handling is part of the Phase 5+ finish criteria and must be verified in implementation.
Writeback enqueue semantics and reclaim-side pin handling are required for the async worker design.
The task spans storage, journal, and daemon layers and needs cross-layer verification.
